title: GradientOptions
description: GradientOptions: Defines options for range and centering for a Gradient.

Name.description: Name of the GradientOption. Will be displayed for Gradient legends.

LowerBound.description: The lower bound of the Gradient. Leave empty to allow other methods to set automatically.

UpperBound.description: The upper bound of the Gradient. Leave empty to allow other methods to set automatically.

GradientCenteringOptions.description: A GradientCenteringOptions enum to set centering options. Defaults to no centering. GradientCenteringOptions: Either do not centre the range of the gradient, extend the range to be centred around 0, or make 0 the midpoint of the gradient while keeping UpperBound and LowerBound as the ends.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
